visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a long denim skirt, enters a brightly lit indoor room from a doorway. She is holding a clear plastic umbrella and has a black crossbody bag. To the left is a tall white chest of drawers and a clothing rack with various jackets. The room has a modern, minimalist aesthetic with light wooden floors. (2) The scene cuts to the same woman now wearing a vibrant, oversized raincoat covered in large, multi-colored polka dots over her previous outfit. She appears distressed and damp, gesturing towards her head and body as if complaining about the rain. She stands near the white drawer unit, which has small items on top like pens and a small mirror. (3) A middle-aged man with short hair enters the room carrying a dark backpack and a motorcycle helmet. He wears a black t-shirt and khaki pants. He looks annoyed and disheveled, shaking himself off as if he just came in from a downpour. The background remains the same closet area with the white drawers. (4) An older man enters the frame wearing the same colorful polka-dot raincoat and a white motorcycle helmet. He looks weary and slightly confused as he enters the room. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the sequence, emphasizing the contrast between the indoor comfort and the implied outdoor rain.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 各年齡下雨時的狀態. [Subtitle]: 年齡2字頭. [Variety]: 狼狽25%. (2) [Slogan]: 各年齡下雨時的狀態. [Slogan]: 雨傘裝飾用?. [Subtitle]: 哎~好濕呀. (3) [Subtitle]: 年齡3字頭. [Variety]: 狼狽50%. (4) [Slogan]: 各年齡下雨時的狀態. [Slogan]: 都要乖好好. [Slogan]: 不漂亮不行. (5) [Subtitle]: 年齡4字頭. [Variety]: 狼狽75%. (6) [Slogan]: 各年齡下雨時的狀態. [Slogan]: 脾氣差什麼都不想管. [Subtitle]: 很濕欸. [Subtitle]: (激動~家裡輪廓氣很好). (7) [Subtitle]: 年齡5字頭. [Variety]: 狼狽100%. (8) [Slogan]: 各年齡下雨時的狀態. [Slogan]: 濕了還不脫?. [Subtitle]: 吼~那裡都濕掉了啦. [Subtitle]: 咦…阿公你在這裡上班嗎…?.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing as younger versions, 1 middle-aged male, and 1 older male.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her 20s/30s wearing casual trendy clothes and then a polka-dot raincoat; a man in his 40s with a backpack; an older man in his 50s/60s in the same raincoat and a helmet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor space featuring a white IKEA-style chest of drawers, a clothing rack with various outer garments, and a doorway leading to a brightly lit area with sheer curtains.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively, bouncy electronic BGM track begins. A female voice speaks with high pitch and animated energy, complaining about getting wet in the rain. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound triggers a shift. The female voice becomes more exaggerated and dramatic, accompanied by the rustling of a plastic raincoat. (3) A sudden cut in the BGM beat leads to a male voice. His pitch is lower, and his tone is visibly annoyed and strained, punctuated by the sound of a heavy backpack being adjusted. (4) The final phase begins with another hard cut. A more mature, slightly raspy male voice speaks with a tone of exhaustion or surprise. The music swells briefly before ending with a short comedic audio sting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic sketch that contrasts the reactions and 'messiness levels' of people in different age groups when encountering rain. It moves from young people trying to maintain style to older people prioritizing extreme practicality and the associated grumpy moods.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'polka-dot raincoat' as a recurring visual gag and uses fast-paced editing and text overlays to drive the comedic comparison.
